blocks.body: A three-year management degree covering marketing, finance, HR, operations and business analytics. It's the runway to an MBA and to early business, analyst and operations roles.

items.label: Typical next degree
items.note: 2 years; the usual step into management

blocks.title: How you get in
blocks.body: 10+2 on merit, or a management entrance test (e.g. CUET, IPMAT, SET, NPAT).

blocks.title: At a glance
items: Most value comes when paired with an MBA — plan for both.
The Business Analytics specialisation feeds analyst and product roles.
Internships matter a lot for early business and sales jobs.
